allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "C:\\Temp" | Out-Null; cd "C:\\Users\\קובי\\Desktop\\Worspace clode\\app"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList '/c npm run dev 2>&1' -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell(try { $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/miuinim" -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host $result.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host \($body | Select-Object -First 200\) })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "C:\\Users\\קובי\\Desktop\\Worspace clode\\app"; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run dev" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\קובי\\Desktop\\Worspace clode\\app" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Server starting")
